chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D-187 of 2026 Saeed Ahmed vs. P. Sindh and others. Date of hearing Order with the signature of the Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2871/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.617/2026 (U/A) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA No.618/2026 (Ex.A) 5. For hearing of main case 22.04.2026 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< During the confrontation, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the main instance that he will avail the appropriate remedy as available to him under the law. In view of such, this constitutional petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed along with the listed applications. However, the petitioner is at liberty to apply or seek a remedy before the appropriate forum. JUDGE JUDGE
